name: Intro
_source: $level_var "mission_1_title" "Martin inflicts at least 15 damage on Boss"
# Camus enters the temple — alone, calm
# Michalis appears suddenly behind him (narrative surprise)
# --- 4) Masked dialogue — Camus first, Michalis intercepts ---
$say "Michalis_Mask" "I'm Michalis of Macedon and I have been summoned here to protect this temple." NumLines=3
$say "Michalis_Mask" "Aren't you the mysterious knight Sirius who joined Marth's Banner in the last war?" NumLines=3
$say "Camus_Mask" "This is not for you to concern." NumLines=1
$say "Michalis_Mask" "You want to keep it a secret?" NumLines=1
$say "Michalis_Mask" "Then I have to force you to spit it out." NumLines=2
$say "Michalis" "The legendary knight Camus is still alive." NumLines=1
$say "Michalis" "I know that was you. I always knew that was you." NumLines=2
$say "Michalis" "It was you who raided Lang's camp so Ogma could jump in and take away the Grustian Royal Heirs." NumLines=3
$say "Michalis" "It was you who risked your life and helped Ogma to protect those kids." NumLines=2
$say "Michalis" "It was you who woke Nyna from the dark magic of Medeus." NumLines=2
$say "Michalis" "From the beginning, it was only you who could do that." NumLines=2
$say "Michalis" "I doubted that the knight Sirius was Camus, but I only believe that momentarily after our fight." NumLines=3
$say "Michalis" "Your lance fight skill is undoubted." NumLines=1
$say "Michalis" "You, the knight Sirius, are the true knight Camus" NumLines=2
$say "Michalis" "the greatest general I have ever known, the strongest warrior I have ever fought." NumLines=3
$say "Michalis" "Why would you just disappear all the time, then suddenly come back|with a mask on your face and fake identify yoursel by the name Sirius?" NumLines=2
$say "Camus_Mask" "General Camus had fallen in the battle with Prince Marth, five years ago." NumLines=2
$say "Camus_Mask" "That is what people know, and that is what I intend to let people know." NumLines=2
$say "Camus_Mask" "I am Sirius, a knight with a mysterious mask." NumLines=1
$say "Michalis" "Do you think that I would let you go with that?" NumLines=2
$say "Michalis" "I will beat you with my force, and then make you accept that you are Camus." NumLines=2
$say "Gotoh" "General, his highness is now one of us."
$say "Gotoh" "From now on, you can be back to your true self, Camus."
$say "Camus" "As her divinity wish, from now on I will be Camus."
$say "Michalis" "Saint Gotoh, what is the meaning of this?"
$say "Gotoh" "Your Highness will soon understand everything since this is the plan of her divinity Naga." NumLines=3
$say "Gotoh" "Now, come with me to the throne, where her divinity is waiting for us." NumLines=3
# --- 8) Warp out + warp into Naga's chamber (loop dedup) ---
$say "Gotoh" "Your divinity, the warriors have come as you requested them to come."
$say "Camus" "Your divinity, I've come as your request."
$say "Michalis" "Your divinity, I've come as your request."
# Naga's prophecy — split into 7 beats for pacing & less render strain
$say "Naga" "As you have come here to me as my request, that shall I grant you the truth that you need to know." NumLines=3
$say "Naga" "Many years ago, before the Dark Dragon Medeus ever came to be there was a prophecy of a truly dark" NumLines=3
$say "Naga" "and evil dragon that would conquer the whole space and time."
$say "Naga" "As I was young, the prophecy is what I care most about."
$say "Naga" "And just before my life passed away, I'd finally learned the truth behind the prophecy." NumLines=3
$say "Naga" "There will be a prince from the clan of the Earth Dragon, who will become the first and true Dark Dragon." NumLines=3
$say "Naga" "He will combine himself with his sons and daughters to become the greatest dark power that even the most powerful divine|power could not defeat..." NumLines=3
$say "Naga" "Just before Prince Marth defeats him for the first time Medeus has evolved himself and becomes a dark dragon." NumLines=3
$say "Naga" "With the new power, Medeus split his soul to very many parts and spread them to many worlds." NumLines=3
$say "Naga" "And in the world called Elibe, one part of his soul had a chance to grow." NumLines=3
$say "Naga" "Using the power of the darkness, he has consumed the local dragon of Elibe and made them his minions." NumLines=3
$say "Naga" "Even one of my divine dragons on that world has disappeared by Medeus."
$say "Naga" "Iduun, my servant, just before her life force disappeared, had sent me a message." NumLines=3
$say "Naga" "The message is about the two sons of Medeus and a prophecy of the seven heroes that someday can slay Medeus." NumLines=3
$say "Naga" "As my last request before you can be free once more I want you to take on the journey to Elibe and stop Medeus's plan." NumLines=3
$say "Naga" "The young king of Macedonia, you had failed the power of the darkness one time." NumLines=3
$say "Naga" "Would you fall into the darkness once more time?"
$say "Michalis" "Only you could change my mind, your divinity."
$say "Michalis" "The darkness inside my heart and my soul has been washed away by the love of my sister." NumLines=3
$say "Michalis" "If I could sacrifice myself to protect their future, I would do anything."
$say "Naga" "Very well, Michalis."           "You are now my servant."
$say "Naga" "You shall accompany Camus to Elibe and aid him on his quest."
$say "Gotoh" "Warriors. Her divinity has granted you her powerful weapon."
$say "Gotoh" "Even though they are not the best as the weapon you used to wield|they are still powerful enough to surpass the weapon on Elibe." NumLines=3
$say "Gotoh" "Good luck, warriors, and may the life force be with you."
# --- 10) Warp out, warp in to meet Anna & Jake ---
$speak "Camus" "What would you two doing here?" NumLines=1
$speak "Gotoh" "General, both of them are just like you, servants of her divinity."
$speak "Gotoh" "They would accompany you on your journey."
$speak "Jake" "General, I'm Jake and I will be your blacksmith."
$speak "Jake" "If your weapon's durability is down, I can maintain and fix it for you."
$speak "Anna" "General Camus, I'm Anna and I will be your merchant."
$speak "Anna" "If you need a weapon or if you have anything that you don't want to use, I could make some magic." NumLines=3
$speak "Jake" "Here are what have ben prepared for you."
$say "Lucina" "So this is the world of Elibe, right?"
$say "Robin" "It seems to be like that." NumLines=1
$say "Lucina" "According to the book we found, Sir Camus and Sir Michalis will be here shortly." NumLines=3
$say "Robin" "I will go back and report this to him, while you sneak around and look after them, deal?" NumLines=3
$say "Lucina" 'I always want to know what the one who called "The Strongest Warrior of Archanea" looks like.' NumLines=3
# Camus + Michalis arrive together, walk in parallel
$say "Camus" "So, we have arrived in this strange world."
$say "Michalis" "But where is Jake and Anna?" NumLines=1
$say "Camus" "They must have arrived in another place."
$say "Camus" "We don't have time to look for them."
$say "Camus" "I believe that somehow we will meet on our way to the dark dragon."
$say "Naga_Divine" "My warriors, one of Medeus's children is near your location."
$say "Naga_Divine" "The first mission is to look for him."
$say "Naga_Divine" "If you find any evidence showing that he is influenced by darkness power you kill him immediately." NumLines=3
$say "Naga_Divine" "Or if you found him and are not sure whether he is influenced by darkness power or not bring him to me as this temple and I can|take care of him myself." NumLines=3
$say "Naga_Divine" "This is the medal made by one of my scales."
$say "Naga_Divine" "It can detect dragon blood from a person upon touching it."
$say "Camus" "Right, let us find the shadow's child."
$say "Michalis" "If we find him, should we kill him on sight?"
$say "Camus" "I think we should defeat him first without killing him, then we..."
# --- 13) Mari is chased by bandit (parallel movement) ---
$say "Bandit1" "Stop right there, or I kill you."
$say "Mari" "If I stop, you just gonna kill me anyway."
$say "Camus" "Looks like that girl is chased by the ugly man."
$say "Michalis" "I won't let you hurt this lady." NumLines=1
$say "Bandit1" "And who are you stopping me?" NumLines=1
$say "Michalis" 'I guess I have to count on this "souveneir"'
$say "Camus" "We will not allow them to hurt you."
$say "Michalis" "Please lead the way to the village, we shall stop those bandit lives."
$say "Mari" "Thank you very much, sirs knights." NumLines=1
# Mari + Camus + Michalis arrive at village edge — parallel walk-in
$say "Mari" "Follow me sirs knights, we are near the village entrance."
$say "Michalis" "This village is not so small, Camus."
$say "Michalis" "You should start to battle them from here, while I go around and strike their back." NumLines=3
$say "Camus" "Lady... Sorry, I forgot to ask for your name."
$say "Mari" "I'm a cleric of the local church."
$say "Camus" "Lady Mari, I think you should find a place to hide because the battle will not be easy." NumLines=3
$say "Mari" "Sir, I would like to stay and help."
$say "Mari" "I'm a cleric, I can help to heal you if you got wounded."
$say "Camus" "But you have to stay behind me so I can protect you, clear?"

_source: speak;Neimi;You were right, Colm...|I am a klutz. Sorry...

name: DeathArtur
_source: speak;Artur;The rest... is up to you.

name: DeathNatasha
_source: speak;Natasha;I can't let myself die here...|Someone has to hear my tale...
speak;Natasha;My fate is irrelevant...|The world must have... light.

name: DeathMoulder
_source: speak;Moulder;I am sorry. I believe this is as far as I go...

name: DeathRoss
_source: speak;Ross;I... am a warrior to the very end.

name: DeathGarcia
_source: speak;Garcia;I have no regrets.{br}This was always my fate.

name: Outro
_source: $say "Michalis" "I will take this, the road will be long and the more the better."
$say "Michalis" "Have you finished the bandits here, brother?"
$say "Michalis" "I see some soldiers are coming here."
$say "Michalis" "Tch.... at a time like this." NumLines=1
$say "Mari" "I'm Mari, a cleric from this village."
$say "Mari" "Your friend seems like is injured so badly and he would collapse at any time."
$say "Mari" "The knight who helps us defend the village is wounded."
$say "Mari" "Hurry up take him to your house and prepare some hot water."
$say "Martin" "Sir, help me carry him, this way sir."

name: MartinFightBandit
_source: $say "Martin" "You coward, attacking a village without any defenses."
$say "Martin" "I'll take your life for this." NumLines=1

name: MartinAppear
_source: $say "Martin" "Those bastards waiting for me to go out and attack the village?"
$say "Michalis" "Hmm, that guy is about to fight with the bandit, let's check on him."
$say "Michalis" "Hey, you are not with the bandit, aren't you?"
$say "Martin" "No, I'm Martin, the village guardian" NumLines=1
$say "Martin" "Those bandits wait for me to go out of the village to attack."
$say "Michalis" "I'm Michalis and the guy on the horse is my friend Camus."
$say "Michalis" "We just arrived when we saw a girl named Mari asking us for help."
$say "Martin" "She asked you guys to help?" NumLines=1
$say "Martin" "Then we must be on the same side." NumLines=1
$say "Martin" "Please help me stop those bandits." NumLines=1
$speak "Michalis" "Yeah. But do not be a burden." NumLines=1

condition: game.level_vars.get('Get_Bounty', False) and ((unit.team == 'player' and unit2.team == 'enemy') or (unit2.team == 'player' and unit.team == 'enemy'))
_source: $say "Bandit1" "Chief, a lone knight is attacking us."
$say "Bandit" "Knight? No matter, one knight can't do anything to stop us."
$say "Bandit" "Let's see if he can outmatch the number of us."

name: MariReciveSpell
_source: $say "Mari" "No! I can't die like this...|Saint Elimine...{br}Please help me..."
$say "" "A warm and radiance light apear" TextPosition="center" StyleNid="hint" NumLines=1 Width=170

name: MariFightEnd
_source: $say "Mari" "I just prey with Saint Elimine, then it just happened."
$say "Camus" "We don't have time for an anwser right now.|Lets check on with it after we finish the bandits."

name: FightSaar
_source: speak;Saar;Enemy of the empire!{br}Death's too good for you!

name: Intro
_source: speak;Martin;Follow me, sir knight.|My house is just over there.
speak;Michalis;It's must be some of Camus's old wound.
speak;Mari;Hurry up Martin.|Could you go and get some medicine while I clean up his wound?
speak;Michalis;I shall go out and gather some woods. Would you need anything else?
speak;Martin;Maybe some animals for dinner, please.
speak;Michalis;I must search for the shadow kid now.|I must do as twice as I could, for Camus too.
speak;Michalis;The medal that I received from lord Naga.|She said that It can locate the shadow kid, doesn't she?
speak;Michalis;You are inside Martin's house, He is this village's guardian.|They took you here to recover. Your wound is a bad one.
speak;Michalis;You have been sleeping for nearly three days, brothers.|While you were sleeping, I was searching for the shadow kid but found nothing.
speak;Camus;The shadow kid... Where is the medal?
speak;Michalis;It's here with me.|A little weird that lord Naga told us it could help to search for the shadow kid, but I|found that it is not working.
speak;Camus;It's working. I'm sure about that.|Just before the pain knocked me down, I saw it glowing when the guy Martin was near me.
speak;Michalis;Martin? The village guardian? Are you sure about that? That kid is perfectly normal.|I don't see any proof that there is dark power within him.

speak;Camus;Do you remember, Michalis?|Lord Naga told us that there is no confirmation that the shadow child is|influenced by the dark power.|Maybe he is truly Medeus's son, but there is no dark power inside him.
speak;Michalis;Then what shall we do, brother?
speak;Camus;Let's give him a test. Give him a chance with this medal.|I saw it glow one time with him, let's see if can glow one more.
speak;Mari;Sir Michalis, the dinner is ready... sir Camus, you have woken up!
speak;Camus;Yes, Mari. Thank you for helping me while I was defenseless.
speak;Mari;You don't have to say that, sir Camus.|You helped us when we needed protection, then helping you is what I should do at least|to return the favor to you.
speak;Camus;No need to do that, Mari. Michalis and me, we are knights.|Protecting people is what we had vowed to do. Right, Michalis.
speak;Michalis;That's right, you don't have to return any favor for us.
speak;Mari;If you said so.|Anyway, dinner will be ready shortly if you would like to join.
speak;Martin;Sir Camus, Sir Michalis.|I would like to thank you one more time for helping defend the village.
speak;Camus;You've already returned the favor to me, Martin.|No need to be like that.
speak;Martin;So, what are you planning to do next?
speak;Camus;Well, we came here to finish a job, but we're delayed by my wound.|So I think that we have to stay for a while.|And after we get the job done, we'll be leaving as soon as possible.
speak;Martin;Job. What kind of job if I might ask?
speak;Michalis;I think we can't give you an answer, since the one who giving it out is quite a big|person and it's a matter of life.
speak;Martin;Well I see. Then I won't be asking for more detail.|Good luck with finishing your job.|If you need some things, just let me know.
speak;Camus;Actually, I think that you can help us a little bit since we are not around here|and we are lacking information.
speak;Camus;We are on a mission searching for a man named Martinez.|Martinez is the heir of a noble house, which is giving us the mission.

speak;Camus;Young lord Martinez, somehow having a misunderstanding with his father Lord|Martinez.|He ran out of the house and the last time people heard about his name was that he was|around this village.

speak;Camus;Years after young lord Martinez left the mansion, lord Martinez went to war as the|king ordered and got a deep wound.|People say that lord Martinez would never be able to hold any longer, but the fact that he|is still holding on for his son to come home.
speak;Martin;I see, lord Martinez loves his son very much.|So how would to plan to search for young lord Martinez?
speak;Michalis;This medal was crafted with the blood of both L.Martinez, his dame and some kind of magic.|We were told that it would help us with finding the young lord.
speak;Camus;Here is it. You can take a look at it if you want.
speak;Martin;Who is talking to me? And what is this place?
speak;Naga_Divine;Here me young Martin, as I will give you the truth of your life and your fate...|I'm Naga, the Divine Dragon, and I speak to you as a dragon to a dragon...
speak;Martin;What? Dragon? What are you talking about?

speak;Naga_Divine;The medal you are holding in your hand, was crafted from one of my scales.|It can sense the power of the dragon blood from a person upon touching it.|It was the medal power that took you here, to the space of the spirit.|You are the same to me, a divine dragon.
speak;Martin;Me... a dragon? A divine dragon?
speak;Naga_Divine;You have your mother's eyes, I can say that.
speak;Martin;My mother? What would you mean by "my mother"?

speak;Naga_Divine;She is my lovely little daughter, my sweet summer child...|A long time ago, an enemy of mine, the dark dragon Medeus was defeated.|Upon being destroyed, he split his soul into many parts and sent them across many|dimensions, through many worlds to re-grow himself and make his army, for one day he will|return to conquer my world.|Knowing that, I send my only remaining child I have, your mother, Iduun the Divine Dragon|to this would stop him.|Unfortunately, your mother had fallen in the battle with Medeus here in this world and was|corrupted.|She giving birth to two newborn dragons, one of them is you.|While you were saved by her last will, your half-blood brother is not that lucky.|The power of darkness inside him was too big to be controllable.|He is now under Medeus's army.
speak;Martin;Do you think that I would believe anything you say?
speak;Naga_Divine;Then why not check them for yourself?|If I can prove that you have the power of the dragon inside you, would you believe me?
speak;Naga_Divine;This is the space inside you very soul.
speak;Naga_Divine;There are many guardians here.|They were created based on the dark power that you were influenced by since you were|just a kid.
speak;Naga_Divine;If you fight them, and using your true power of a divine dragon, you can clean this place|from the dark power, and maybe wash away from you.
speak;Naga_Divine;That's right, your dragon power.|The medal I gave you was crafted from my very own power.|It can be used to awaken the dragon power sleeping inside of you.
speak;Naga_Divine;We are in your mind, there will be no harm to your body.|Besides, you are a dragon so you will have great regeneration speed.
speak;Martin;Why should I do this test anyway?

name: Outro
_source: speak;Martin;So it seems that your words are true.
speak;Naga_Divine;I would never lie to you. After all, you are one of my kind.
speak;Martin;What would I do next? About my half-blood brother and everything?

speak;Naga_Divine;I do not know if your mother Iduun is still alive or not.|One thing I know is that Medeus and your half-blood brother have already found out|about your existence.|Doing nothing just gives them time to come and kill you, or maybe trying to lure you into|their group like what they did to your mother, being corrupted.
speak;Martin;Then what should I do now?
speak;Naga_Divine;You are the one who knows the best.|You and your half-blood brother somehow got linked to each other.|Use that link to find him, and stop him.
speak;Naga_Divine;This is your mind, you can come anytime you want.
speak;Camus;What has come to your mind, Martin?
speak;Martin;Naga seeks me and she has told me everything.|Look like I have to stick with you knights for a little while.
speak;Camus;And when everything is done, you will be free to return here and live your life.
speak;Martin;I think I'll do that. But I need some fresh air, so please wait here.|I'll be back in no time.
speak;Michalis;... As I thought... he's running away!|Should we kill him after capturing him?
speak;Camus;Don't do it! Capture him without killing him, remember?|So that we can bring him to Naga.
speak;Michalis;Very well, let's chase him, brother.

name: Intro
_source: speak;Martin;...|Seems like I've been found out, I must flee right now!
speak;Gazabin;Lookee here, boys. A lost bird.|A lost bird that never learned to fly.
speak;Gazabin;Not recognize me?|Of course, ya won't recognize me.
speak;Gazabin;The name is Gazabin ya, chief of the Gazabin's Crew.|Ya just killed my mate a couple of days ago.|Don't ya remember?
speak;Martin;So it was you who attacked the village while I was leaving?
speak;Gazabin;Don't ya blame the man.|The man is just a bandit, robbing people is what the man does, ya see.
speak;Gazabin;Ya did kill the man's mate, so now the man seeking revenge, that is normal.
speak;Martin;That is what I intend to do.
speak;Michalis;We won't let you kill Martin!
speak;Camus;I am the one who killed your boy this morning!
speak;Gazabin;Is that so? Then the man will kill ya all, bastards!!!
speak;Camus;Martin, we'll talk later.|Let's wipe out those bandits first!

name: Armory
_source: shop;{unit};Iron Sword,Slim Sword,Iron Lance,Slim Lance,Iron Axe

name: Armory
_source: shop;{unit};Iron Sword,Slim Sword,Steel Sword,Iron Lance,Slim Lance,Steel Lance,Iron Axe,Steel Axe,Iron Bow,Steel Bow

name: Village1
_source: speak;Tethys;Oh, hello.{br}Did you come to see me dance?|I'm sorry, but I just finished a few moments ago.{w}{clear}Oh, by the way...Would you be interested in one of these items?|A wealthy patron left me a small ransom in gifts after watching my performance.|You can sell one for gold if you'd like or use them to improve your skills.|I simply cannot carry all of this by myself, so please, take this one.|Wealth is useless if you can't use it to bring happiness to others, right?| Thanks for dropping by. Perhaps we'll meet again someday.

name: Village2
_source: speak;Man2;Life in Serafew's been harder since the Grado occupation force took over here.|Serafew's got Renais citizens as well as Grado, but it's been hardest on us.|They've singled out families from Renais for the most awful atrocities.{w}{clear}Please, traveler, take this sword.|It's an armorslayer. It'll cut through even the strongest armor.|Take it and strike down that blackheart, Saar.

name: Village3
_source: speak;OldMan1;In my youth, I was a knight of some renown, I'll have you know.|I've even crossed blades with one of Grado's most famous generals, I have.|Ah, but I'm an old man now...|I'm starting to worry... What if I die without passing on my techniques?|So I decided to write down what I've learned in a book. I have it here.|You seem like a strong warrior. I'd be honored if you would accept it.

name: Village4
_source: speak;Amelia;Hope everyone's well back home in Silva. Just a bit more, and I'll be in the empire.|Let's see, I've got vulneraries, antitoxins...|Oh! And I can't let myself forget torches for when it gets dark.|Yep! I'm all set!{br}Now I just need to get to the capital.|I'll be the finest soldier the Grado army's ever seen! I swear it!

name: Village1
_source: speak;Man1;Do you see that old snag to the south of here?|Bet it would make a handy bridge if you could knock it over.|Take a weapon to it and give it a few good whacks. That should do it.|Here, take this and give it a try.{br}It ought to do the trick.

name: Village2
_source: speak;Lute;Your flesh shows no sign of putrefaction.|It seems you're not a revenant.
speak;{unit};Well, I should hope not! I wanted you to know help has arrived.|Please be patient a bit longer...
speak;Lute;No, no. I insist on joining you in combat.|I've been reading up on these revenants.{br}They are, quite simply, no match for me.|I am superior after all.
speak;Lute;Your flesh shows no sign of putrefaction.|It seems you're not a revenant.
speak;{unit};No, I'm not{br}Are you from around here?|There are still monsters about, so you should stay in--

speak;Lute;No, no. I insist on joining you in combat.|My name is Lute. I'm a mage of superior wisdom and rare ability.|I've been reading up on these revenants.{br}They are, quite simply, no match for me.|I am superior after all.

speak;Lute;Your flesh shows no sign of putrefaction.|It seems you're not a revenant.|I've decided to join you in battle now.|My name is Lute. I'm a mage of superior wisdom and rare ability.|I've been reading up on these revenants.{br}They are, quite simply, no match for me.|I am superior after all.

name: NatashaJoshuaTalk
_source: speak;Natasha;You...You're that man I met...|Are you here to capture me? You've been hired to silence me, haven't you...
speak;Joshua;Yeah, Grado's paying the bill.{br}They want you dead, you know?|But don't feel bad. It's not personal.

speak;Natasha;Wait, please...|It doesn't matter what happens to me, but you must hear my words.|The emperor of Grado is changed.{br}He is not the man he once was.|The other nations must be warned before he extinguishes all light from out lands.
speak;Joshua;Hey, no offense, but I'm just a mercenary. I don't care about Grado or its emperor.|Everything you say may be true, or it may be lies. I don't care either way.
speak;Joshua;Even so...Killing a beautiful lady like you would leave a bad taste in my mouth.{w}{clear}Tell me, do you like to gamble?
speak;Joshua;Gambling's what I live for. Even when I lose, I never want to stop.|Let's have us a little wager.{br}If you win, I'll believe you.|Heads or tails, you call it.
speak;Natasha;You can't...{br}This is no time for games...
speak;Joshua;Would you rather I get on with the job I was hired for?
speak;Joshua;All right. So I'm heads, and you're tails.|Here we go.|... ... ...
speak;Joshua;What do you know?!{w}{clear}It's tails. You win. Figures. I haven't won anything all day.|Well, Lady Luck has spoken.{br}Guess I'm on your side now.
speak;Joshua;Yeah. Sure, I might cheat, but I never worm out of a bet. It's a rule of mine.
speak;Natasha;Oh, thank heaven! Thank you, blessed light, for your protection!
speak;Joshua;I got nothing against heaven, but I'm right here if you want someone to thank...|No? Well, get behind me then. I've got to take care of these fools.

name: FightGazabin
_source: speak;Gazabin;There ya are.... |Here comes the man's revenge, ya bastards!!!

name: Outro
_source: speak;Mari;Martin, why did you run away?{br}They won't hurt you.
speak;Martin;Yeah yeah.|And they told me that I'm having the bloodline of a dragon and|they even told me that I am having a crazy mission!
speak;Mari;Don't be stupid Martin.       {br}They saved us, didn't they?
speak;Martin;But they wanted me to kill my half-blooded brother!
speak;Camus;We didn't ask you to do that, just leave this to us.|But we need you to lead us to where your brother is!
speak;Camus;Because he's a dark dragon now, and he would destroy, not only this world but also|many other worlds at any time!{br}So, please help us, okay?
speak;Martin;I will consider it. But I won't promise anything about it.
speak;Michalis;You also have to fight, too.|Because we aren't sure if we can protect you and your girlfriend or not...
speak;Mari;I can come with you.{br}Hurray!|Thank you, sirs.
speak;Martin;Okay okay, fine. I'll go with you guys.|But where will we go?
speak;Camus;First, let's go to the city.      {br}We must prepare our supplies...
speak;Camus;Cut it out, man.|But, of course, we also need more manpower for this dangerous adventure.
speak;Mari;Then let's go to Bern, the capital of my country.|It takes only three days to get there.
speak;Camus;Very well.|Please lead us the way, my lady.

name: Intro
_source: speak;Seth;The local villagers tell me that Bazba's Bandits keep their lair nearby.|A few of them saw a lad matching the description of our bracelet thief.|It seems a fair guess that the youth is one of these bandits.
speak;Eirika;Bandits... Here in Renais, our homeland. I had no idea...|Burning our villages... Stealing from our people with no fear of reprisal?

speak;Seth;It wasn't always like this. The knights used to protect the citizenry...|However, with Renais in ruins and her army tattered, law and order are hard to find.|It doesn't look like the Grado army is interested in maintaining order here.|If nothing changes, Renais will continue this sad plunge into savagery.
speak;Neimi;Pardon me for asking...|but are you all some sort of...mercenary troop?
speak;Neimi;P-p-please, you have to help Colm. You have to!|I told him it was too dangerous, but he wouldn't listen to me!
speak;Eirika;Please, you must calm yourself. Start at the beginning, and speak slowly.
speak;Neimi;All right...Sniff.|I'm Neimi.|I'm from... I used to be from a village named Lark...|Except the village is gone.
speak;Neimi;Bazba's Bandits burned it down.{br}Only Colm and I escaped.|The other villagers...{br}The bandits attacked them and...
speak;Seth;Neimi, what are you doing here?

speak;Neimi;Bazba's Bandits... They have a hideout here in these mountains.|That's where Colm...|Um, Colm's my...uh...We've known each other since we were kids.|He went to steal back something the bandits took from me...
speak;Eirika;He went alone? That's a very dangerous thing...
speak;Neimi;Yes, I know. Th-that's what I told him, but he wouldn't listen to me.|If I lose Colm, too, I don't know... I...I'll... sniff...
speak;Eirika;Wait, please don't cry.|Don't worry. We'll find your friend and see that he's not harmed.
speak;Neimi;Really? Really and truly?{br}Oh, thank you! Thank you!!!|I... I don't have much money, but.. I'll do anything to help.
speak;Seth;Your Highness? What will it be?

speak;Eirika;If the thief we're after has gone to the bandits' lair as well...|Well, it seems as though we share a common cause with Neimi.|She is a citizen of Renais, after all.|And isn't it our duty to defend our countrymen?|I'm only sad that we weren't here to protect her friends and neighbors...|So, yes, I feel we must help her.
speak;Seth;Very well. Neimi, I trust you can lead the way?
speak;Neimi;Um... Is there anything I can do to help? I feel so...|When I was little I used to go hunting with my grandfather.|What I mean is I can--{br}I'm not bad with a bow.
speak;Seth;I see.|You should remain behind and protect Princess Eirika.
speak;Bazba;Hm. Not sure who's out there, but it looks like we've got guests.|Let's give 'em a warm welcome, lads.{br}You see a stranger, stick an axe in him!

name: Turn2
_source: speak;Colm;And here we go!|Ha! And not a soul saw me. These bandits are easy picking.|I guess I might as well start with these chests here.

name: NeimiColmTalk
_source: speak;Colm;Neimi?!{br}What are you doing here?|I told you to wait for me, didnt I?
speak;Neimi;I couldnt... Its too dangerous.|Cmon, lets go home.
speak;Colm;We dont have a home! Dont you get it? Look, just leave everything to me.|I can take care of it in a flash, but I dont need a clumsy oaf like you tagging along.
speak;Colm;Oh, this is ridiculous.|Well talk later. Dont leave my side, Neimi.

name: Outro
_source: speak;Colm;What now? I told you not to worry.|I could've robbed these bandits blind on my own, thank you very much.
speak;Colm;H-Hold on! I'm sorry!{br}C'mon! Don't start bawling!
speak;Colm;Fine, fine. I promise.|But you have to stop crying all the time. All right?
speak;Colm;Oh, yeah. Take a look at this.

speak;Colm;I got your mirror back.|Remember how you cried when we left Lark? You thought you'd lost this.|I knew it was your mother's, and I knew those thugs had taken it.|So I went and got it back!|See what happens when you give me a job? Guaranteed results!
speak;Colm;Hey wh-why are you crying this time?|C'mon! Stop! Knock it off! Please, Neimi...
speak;Seth;...This is quite touching, but...|I think you'd best return Princess Eirika's bracelet to her now.
speak;Colm;Wh-what are you talking about?{br}Are you trying to say that I--
speak;Colm;Whoa! Whoa there! Hold it! It's right here! Take it!
speak;Seth;......|Tell me, boy, is this the path you've chosen for your life?|If this girl matters to you, you must quit this dark road.
speak;Seth;We're leaving. Do not expect to be rescued again.|Farewell.
speak;Colm;...Hey, wait!|Let us go with you. You can't just leave us here.

speak;Colm;Neimi and I... We've got no home to return to.|No matter where we go, there's just gonna be more fighting.|You're mercenaries, right?{br}Well, then take us with you.|I'm a handy guy to have around. I know I can help you out.
speak;Seth;I would prefer not, but I'll agree with Eirika's decision.|Our duty is a grave one however. We've no time to waste shepherding you.
speak;Colm;That's fine with us.|You just wait--I promise you won't regret your decision.
speak;Seth;I retrieved your bracelet from the bandit's stronghold.|Here you are, Princess.
speak;Eirika;Thank you, Seth.|You know...Father gave me this bracelet when I was a child.|It has only one match in the world, and my brother wears it.
speak;Seth;Lady Eirika, you must take care never to lose that bracelet.|It is the proof that King Fado entrusted the future of Renais to you, his children.
speak;Eirika;Seth...What is it you're not telling me?
speak;Seth;...I apologize, Your Highness.|When the time comes, I will tell you what I know. Until then, I...
speak;Eirika;I see.|If you tell me it must wait, then it can wait. I trust you.
speak;Seth;Then we should get moving again.|We're safe from bandits for now, but I can't guarantee for how long.
speak;Eirika;This... This is just the beginning, isn't it?|If we hope to free our homeland, it will take battle after battle...
speak;Seth;I'm afraid so, Your Highness.|The day you and Prince Ephraim win back the freedom and honor of Renais will come.|But I fear it lies at the end of a long and treacherous road.
speak;Eirika;I know. I must fight for that day.|In the names of all those I could not save, I'll lead us home.|Let's go. My brother awaits!
speak;Duessel;Selena. Have you been back long?|Tell me, how fares the campaign in Renais?
speak;Selena;Signs of chaos abound.|Brigands ride without fear, and the peasant's cries fill the air.
speak;Duessel;Hmm...|If Grado's troops do not enforce public order, the situation will only worsen.|And still, His Majesty has given us no orders.|Perhaps, just this once, I should take the lead...
speak;Glen;What could His Majesty be thinking?|Breaking our long-held alliance with Renais--invading without warning...|He's never been this way before. He abhors violence.;low_priority

speak;Glen;And have you noticed the recent promotions? Who are they are going to?|Certainly not to the soldiers who have Grado's best interests at heart.|I feel this invasion is the prelude to a much larger war.|I feel as though His Majesty is no longer the man we knew him to be.
speak;Selena;Glen, it doesn't matter what any of us might think of our orders.|We are his servants, and we will not question His Majesty's intentions.
speak;Glen;I know that, Selena. And yet...
speak;Duessel;That's enough. Both of you. His Majesty summons us.|Let's hope we can learn a little during our audience.
# Load the units that are necessary to display for cutscene

speak;Vigarde;...I appreciate your work in fulfilling your previous orders.|You are the hammers that drive the nails of the empire's will...|You will continue to operate{br}...without hesitation...|wherever I send you.

speak;Vigarde;...However, I know this...|You, my Imperial Three, lack the strength to conquer the remaining nations alone.|In the invasion of Renais, certain soldiers performed beyond expectation.|I have chosen them to join you as new generals in the empire's service.|...Come.
speak;Vigarde;...The performance of these men surpassed even your own.|With the addition of these three...|The empire will have six generals strong enough to conquer this land.|Do you understand?
speak;Riev;Heh heh heh...|I am Riev, given the name Blood Beryl by His Majesty.|I know I am a newcomer, but I pray for your favor.
speak;Caellach;I'm Caellach. I was a mercenary, fighting in the desert.|Seems I'm to be called Tiger Eye...|You're a fine lookin' lass, aren't you? Yeah, I'm gonna love working with you.
speak;Valter;So we meet again. You know me as General Valter, but you will call me the Moonstone.|I'll save you worthless dogs from your own incompetence. You'll thank me later.
speak;Vigarde;Selena. Caellach. You will bring me Frelia.
speak;Vigarde;Riev. Duessel. You are charged with the defense of the empire.|...I will speak to you individually with more details later.
speak;Vigarde;Valter, Glen...{br}I have other duties for you...
speak;Vigarde;Renais has fallen, but Princess Eirika still eludes us...|Her brother, Prince Ephraim, leads a resistance within our borders.|Bring the siblings to me.

name: FightBazba
_source: speak;Bazba;I'm the head of this bandit pack, the mighty Bazba!{w}{clear}Hope you've enjoyed your life, 'cuz it's about to end!

name: Eirika/Bazba
_source: speak;Bazba;Hah... You look like a pampered noble, not a soldier.|Who the heck are you supposed to be?
speak;Eirika;I am Princess Eirika.|Your crimes against the people of Renais end today!
speak;Bazba;You'll regret taking that tone with me.|I'm the mighty Bazba, after all!|The likes of you can hardly even scratch me.

name: Intro
_source: speak;Seth;We're approaching Serafew, at the border of Renais and Grado.|Once we cross, we'll be in Grado...{br}Renvall won't be much farther.
speak;Eirika;That is, assuming we can cross the border without mishap...|Oh!{br}Look! Over there!
# Add the enemy army back to the map
# (Screen goes to the map, with monsters spreading everywhere)
speak;Eirika;Those strange figures...{br}What...What are they?|Are they...human?
speak;Seth;I've never seen anything like it. What could they be?
# (Screen goes to a southern village with Artur and Lute)
speak;Artur;What have we done to deserve the trials before us? What is happening to us?|How could such abominations walk our lands while the Sacred Stones protect us?
speak;Artur;Lute, please, it's dangerous outside the walls. Stay here in the village.
speak;Lute;Those are revenants, aren't they?|They were the vanguard of the Demon King in the days of darkness.|The Tome of Nazania describes them in chapter 2, section 7, paragraph 8.
speak;Lute;Duh! I'm a prodigy. I can recall almost everything I see or hear.|According to the book, revenants attack using razor-sharp claws.|Sounds painful, wouldn't you say?
speak;Artur;Yes, er, well... Be that as it may, I must go aid those travelers outside.|You should stay here within the safety of the village.
speak;Lute;Very well. I don't mind staying here. In fact, it seems the smarter choice.

speak;Lute;Magic is far more powerful than any monster's claws.|The thickest hide and the strongest armor are useless against magic's power.|Yes, I suppose I could have studied swords, but only magic is worthy of me.|Even if this village were to be assaulted by monsters, I could defend it perfectly.
# Artur runs up to Eirika's group
speak;Artur;Travelers, you must listen to me! The ancient forest of Za'ha is dangerous.|Head south and pass through this place before the fiends surround you!

speak;Artur;My name is Artur.|The temple has assigned me the task of cleansing the forest of these...things.|There are so many of the fiends, though.{br}I wonder if I stand much chance alone.|So if you would, please flee now while you have the chance.
speak;Eirika;Fiends?|You're not talking about the same fiends that served the ancient Demon King?|That can't be right... They're nothing but legends and fairy tales...
speak;Artur;Yes, I felt the same way when I heard.|And yet here they are. This place is filled with them.|I wonder how far they've spread...{br}Surely they're not in Renais alone.
speak;Artur;Please allow me to deal with this.
speak;Artur;Evil shade! May the blessed light drive you from this land!
speak;Seth;We ought to help. He can't fight them all alone. Do you have orders?
speak;Artur;One of my companions is in that village to the south.|If you can get there swiftly, I implore you to watch over her safety.

name: Turn2
_source: speak;Bandit1;Look at this. Now's our chance!|C'mon, lads!|Let's join the fights and steal our way through this pathetic town!

name: Turn3
_source: speak;L'arachel;Oh, my!|Those travelers are being besieged by the agents of evil!
speak;Dozla;Ha ha ha! Right you are, Lady L'Arachel!
speak;L'Arachel;I cannot allow this to happen!{br}Come!|We must charge down these cliffs and rush to their aid!
speak;Rennac;We charge down these cliffs, and the only thing we'll be rushing to is death.|How about we find us a nice, gentle path down, hm?
speak;L'arachel;Ah...Yes, well...Let us hurry nonetheless.|I simply cannot abide those wicked beasts running amok!

name: Outro
_source: speak;Seth;We've killed all the monsters.|Still, we'd best burn the bones to ash to be sure they don't return.;low_priority
speak;Eirika;I still can't believe what we've been fighting here...|I'd thought those fiends nothing more than myth and legend.
speak;Seth;Those revenants are said to be the least of the dark creatures.|And yet, the weakest of them could outmatch any normal man.|We cannot take this enemy lightly.;low_priority

speak;Lute;Oh, yes. There are much worse then those revenants and the entombed...|Let's see, there's the bonewalkers, mauthe doogs, gargoyles, baels... |Why, I'll bet you just about any creature of lore could be walking again.|Yes, we're in for some trouble. Even my fabulous power may not be enough.
speak;Artur;O divine light, show me... Is this a sign of dark days to come?;low_priority
speak;Eirika;By all that's holy, what is happening?
speak;Eirika;By all that's holy, what is happening?

speak;Seth;Princess Eirika, perhaps it would be wise to return to Frelia and regroup.|Pressing forward seems foolish in light of recent events.|We cannot face both Grado's forces and more of those terrible things.

speak;Eirika;Seth, I follow your point, and nothing would please me more then running for safety.|But what of my brother? He and his men are still trapped in the same situation we are.|I know full well that I may be leading us into even greater danger, but...|Please try to understand.
speak;Seth;I do, my princess, and I vow to see you through this safely.
speak;L'arachel;Aha! Foul creatures, beware!|I, L'arachel, bestow upon you the honor at banishment at my blessed hands!
speak;L'arachel;Ah, glad tidings indeed!{br}The heavens must be rejoicing!|I am...a tad disappointed however.|After all, I did rush all the way here to show you the splendor of my might.
speak;Dozla;Gwah ha ha! It's a real shame, innit, Lady L'Arachel?!
speak;Rennac;What's shameful is the way you drag us around the countryside.
speak;L'arachel;Me?|Since you ask, please allow me to introduce myself.|It is I, the true light and glory of the sacred realm of Rausten...
speak;Dozla;Stop! Lady L'arachel, you mustn't continue!|You cannot reveal your true identity here!
speak;L'arachel;Oh, yes, you're right. Oh, I get so careless sometimes!|Now, I must ride off in anonymity. Oh, how beautifully romantic!
speak;L'arachel;Fare thee well, strangers.{br}Perhaps our paths will cross again.|Come, Dozla! Rennac!{br}We ride!

name: Intro
_source: speak;Joshua;Well, well. There's an arena in this town.|Perfect. My pocket's feeling a bit light.
speak;Joshua;Say, is that a cleric? It is!{br}And a gorgeous one at that.
speak;Joshua;No, pardon me! I never meant to startle you.|May I offer my apologies....
speak;Natasha;No, it's not necessary...{br}It was my fault.|Excuse me, I must be going...{br}Good day to you.
speak;Joshua;...And there she goes.|Not my lucky day...{br}She was quite the beauty, too.|Ah, such is life. I think I've time still to visit the arena, though.
# (View moves north, Glen is talking to Saar)

speak;Glen;Captain Saar of the Serafew Border Guard. How fare you?|I bring orders from His Majesty.|Rumor has it that Princess Eirika of Renais is making her way to Grado.|You are to find her and to place her in custody immediately.

speak;Glen;One more thing...|A traitor to the empire has fled Castle Grado.|We've received reports she is hiding somewhere here in Serafew.|I don't care if you have to tear this town apart. Find the turncoat.
speak;Saar;Yes, sir, General Glen!|If she resists, do we have permission to execute her?
speak;Saar;Understood! Grado's will be done.|The Grado Empire will repay the debt of betrayal with blood!
speak;Glen;...His Majesty relies upon you, Captain. Be sure his trust is not misplaced.|That is all.
speak;Glen;Such loyalty to the crown.|If only I could hold such conviction in the righteousness of our emperor.
speak;Glen;No...Pay no mind to me.|Come, Cormag. Let's go.|From here, we ride northeast, back to the fort.
# (They fly off, replaces by Seth and Eirika, outside the town)

speak;Eirika;It's been so long since I last visited Serafew.|My brother and I used to pass through here en route to Grado.|I remember the harmony in which the people of both countries lived.|No walls divided our borders. No soldiers stood guard in high towers.|The border town... It was to me a symbol of the trust between Grado and Renais.
speak;Seth;...And now, it is firmly under the thumb of Grado's emperor.
speak;Eirika;The peace I remember in this city...|It seems like something from another time. It seems lost now... Forever.

speak;Seth;...The city doesn't seem to be very heavily patrolled.|They must feel it's not worth guarding with Castle Renais under their control.|We must try to not draw attention to ourselves. The west gate is undermanned....
speak;Saleh;Pardon me, may I ask you a question?
speak;Saleh;I'm looking for someone.|Have you seen a young girl with indigo hair?
speak;Eirika;There was something very odd about that man, wouldn't you say?
speak;Seth;He did seem unusual. He didn't strike me as a Grado spy, but...
speak;SoldierRed;Catch her! Don't let her escape!
speak;SoldierRed;That way! She went that way!
speak;Eirika;Let's see what the commotion is.
# (Screen goes to town, there are some soldiers surrounding Natasha)
speak;SoldierRed;Traitor Natasha!{br}Surrender peacefully.|Come quietly, and you may have the chance to explain yourself before His Majesty.
speak;Natasha;Wait, please.{br}You must listen to me!
speak;Natasha;No, you must believe me!|The emperor is not himself. You MUST be able to see that!
speak;SoldierRed;Impugn the emperor at your peril!|We've been ordered to execute you if you offer any resistance.|But your words condemn you!
speak;Eirika;That cleric is a traitor to the throne of Grado?|What madness is this?
speak;Eirika;I'm from Renais. Why are these Grado men after you?
speak;Natasha;You're from Renais... Oh!|I have something I must tell you. It's about Grado--
speak;Eirika;Wait--Grado soldiers are coming this way.|We'll have to talk later.{br}Now we must fight!
speak;Joshua;So much for my dreams of making my fortune here...|First the girl, now the gold.{br}It really isn't my lucky day.
speak;SoldierRed;You there! Mercenary! What are you doing here at the arena?|Get back to the staging area now!
speak;Joshua;C'mon, why don't we both hit the arena?{br}It'll be good training.|If you're going to risk your life anyway, you may as well try to earn some gold.
speak;SoldierRed;I'm reporting you to the captain! You'll be lucky if he just docks your pay!|Don't forget--You can be replaced in an eyeblink, you filthy sellsword!

speak;Joshua;Don't worry, little man.{br}I won't forget.|Work's work, but I don't like fighting women...|Now then, what's the rest of the day got in store for me?{w}{clear}...Tails huh? That's nothing but bad luck and more bad luck...
speak;Natasha;They may not want to hear what I have to say, but...|I must speak with one of the Grado soldiers.|Oh, if only one of them will listen to my words...|Please! Grant me strength.

name: Skill_Swap_Class_Data
_source: # --- Dựng class chain bằng cách walk theo promotes_from trong DB.classes (classes.json) ---
# Bắt đầu từ class hiện tại, mỗi bước lấy promotes_from của class hiện hành; dừng khi gặp None hoặc chuỗi rỗng.
# Kết quả chain[0] = class hiện tại, chain[1:] = các MasteredClasses (theo thứ tự promotion mới nhất -> gốc).
game_var;CLASS_CHAIN;(lambda f: f(f, u('{unit}').klass, []))(lambda f, k, acc: acc if not k or DB.classes.get(k) is None else f(f, DB.classes.get(k).promotes_from, acc + [k]))
# Mastered classes (chain[1:]): học toàn bộ skill vô điều kiện

game_var;ALL_CLASS_SKILLS;list(dict.fromkeys([s for d in [next((x for x in game.get_data('ClassData') if x.nid == {v:CLASS_CHAIN}[0]), None)] if d for (s, lv) in [(d.Class, 0), (d.Assit, 0), (d.SlotA, 3), (d.SlotB, 3), (d.SlotC, 3), (d.Special, 5)] if s and u('{unit}').level >= lv] + [s for k in {v:CLASS_CHAIN}[1:] for d in [next((x for x in game.get_data('ClassData') if x.nid == k), None)] if d for s in [d.Class, d.Assit, d.SlotA, d.SlotB, d.SlotC, d.Special] if s]))
# --- Lưu vào field: MasteredClasses = chain bỏ class hiện tại ---
# --- Give skill vào unit.skills (after_gain_skill hook tự dedupe theo priority) ---

name: Skill_Swap_Setup
_source: #Make sure the unit fields exist so later expressions don't blow up.

#Pull every slot-typed skill the unit currently owns (LearnedSkills + unit.skills, deduped). Personal skills and give_skill/addskill results all live in unit.skills. Weapon-granted skills (weapon_*_skill components) are also gathered so the menu can display them in the matching category row.

game_var;ALL_SLOT_SKILLS;list(dict.fromkeys([s for s in (u('{unit}').get_field('LearnedSkills') or []) if s and DB.skills.get(s) and any(c.nid in ('special_skill','slota_skill','slotb_skill','slotc_skill','assist_skill','weapon_special_skill','weapon_slota_skill','weapon_slotb_skill','weapon_slotc_skill','weapon_assist_skill') for c in DB.skills.get(s).components)] + [sk.nid for sk in u('{unit}').skills if sk.nid and DB.skills.get(sk.nid) and any(c.nid in ('special_skill','slota_skill','slotb_skill','slotc_skill','assist_skill','weapon_special_skill','weapon_slota_skill','weapon_slotb_skill','weapon_slotc_skill','weapon_assist_skill') for c in DB.skills.get(sk.nid).components)]))

#EquippedSkills is derived directly from unit.skills (single source of truth). For each category, prefer the weapon skill if one is present (it overrides), otherwise fall back to the regular slot skill. The after_gain_skill hook already guarantees at most one regular skill per category in unit.skills.

set_unit_field;{unit};EquippedSkills;[s for s in [next((sk.nid for sk in u('{unit}').skills if sk.nid and DB.skills.get(sk.nid) and any(c.nid==wn for c in DB.skills.get(sk.nid).components)), None) or next((sk.nid for sk in u('{unit}').skills if sk.nid and DB.skills.get(sk.nid) and any(c.nid==rn for c in DB.skills.get(sk.nid).components)), None) for rn,wn in [('special_skill','weapon_special_skill'),('slota_skill','weapon_slota_skill'),('slotb_skill','weapon_slotb_skill'),('slotc_skill','weapon_slotc_skill'),('assist_skill','weapon_assist_skill')]] if s]

#Right-panel table dynamically follows whichever category row the cursor is hovering over on the left choice. Each row is mapped to its regular-category nid; weapon variants are treated as the same category so the right panel still shows learned-but-unequipped regular skills of that category (you can never re-equip a weapon skill manually anyway, since it is bound to the weapon).

table;UNIT_RIGHT_SKILLS;(lambda h, learned, equipped, classify=lambda nid: 'special_skill' if nid=='Empty_Special' or (DB.skills.get(nid) and any(c.nid=='special_skill' for c in DB.skills.get(nid).components)) else 'slota_skill' if nid=='Empty_SlotA' or (DB.skills.get(nid) and any(c.nid=='slota_skill' for c in DB.skills.get(nid).components)) else 'slotb_skill' if nid=='Empty_SlotB' or (DB.skills.get(nid) and any(c.nid=='slotb_skill' for c in DB.skills.get(nid).components)) else 'slotc_skill' if nid=='Empty_SlotC' or (DB.skills.get(nid) and any(c.nid=='slotc_skill' for c in DB.skills.get(nid).components)) else 'assist_skill': ([s for s in learned if s and s not in equipped and DB.skills.get(s) and any(c.nid==classify(h) for c in DB.skills.get(s).components)] or ['Empty_Skill_List']))(game.game_vars.get('UNIT_SELECTED_SKILL_choice_hover','Empty_Special'), (u('{unit}').get_field('LearnedSkills') or []), (u('{unit}').get_field('EquippedSkills') or []));Learned Skills;5,1;100;top_right;menu_bg_base;type_skill;left;expression
#Equipped choice: 5 fixed rows, re-evaluated live so the cursor stays after add/remove/swap and the list refreshes itself. Each row prefers the weapon skill in that category if present.

choice;UNIT_SELECTED_SKILL;Equipped Skills;[(next((sk.nid for sk in u('{unit}').skills if sk.nid and DB.skills.get(sk.nid) and any(c.nid==wn for c in DB.skills.get(sk.nid).components)), None) or next((sk.nid for sk in u('{unit}').skills if sk.nid and DB.skills.get(sk.nid) and any(c.nid==rn for c in DB.skills.get(sk.nid).components)), None) or default) for rn,wn,default in [('special_skill','weapon_special_skill','Empty_Special'),('slota_skill','weapon_slota_skill','Empty_SlotA'),('slotb_skill','weapon_slotb_skill','Empty_SlotB'),('slotc_skill','weapon_slotc_skill','Empty_SlotC'),('assist_skill','weapon_assist_skill','Empty_Assist')]];100;vert;top_left;;Global Skill_Swap_Operations;type_skill;5,1;left;backable;persist;expression

name: Skill_Swap_Operations
_source: #A slot occupied by a weapon-granted skill is locked: the player can only Cancel. The weapon skill is detected by the presence of any weapon_*_skill component on the selected skill.

game_var;IS_WEAPON_SLOT;bool(DB.skills.get('{v:UNIT_SELECTED_SKILL}')) and any(c.nid in ('weapon_special_skill','weapon_slota_skill','weapon_slotb_skill','weapon_slotc_skill','weapon_assist_skill') for c in DB.skills.get('{v:UNIT_SELECTED_SKILL}').components)

#Determine the category of the slot the player is operating on, based on the selected skill's components (or its dummy nid). Weapon skill components map to the same SPECIAL/SLOTA/... category as their regular counterpart.

game_var;SELECTED_CATEGORY;'SPECIAL' if '{v:UNIT_SELECTED_SKILL}'=='Empty_Special' or (DB.skills.get('{v:UNIT_SELECTED_SKILL}') and any(c.nid in ('special_skill','weapon_special_skill') for c in DB.skills.get('{v:UNIT_SELECTED_SKILL}').components)) else 'SLOTA' if '{v:UNIT_SELECTED_SKILL}'=='Empty_SlotA' or (DB.skills.get('{v:UNIT_SELECTED_SKILL}') and any(c.nid in ('slota_skill','weapon_slota_skill') for c in DB.skills.get('{v:UNIT_SELECTED_SKILL}').components)) else 'SLOTB' if '{v:UNIT_SELECTED_SKILL}'=='Empty_SlotB' or (DB.skills.get('{v:UNIT_SELECTED_SKILL}') and any(c.nid in ('slotb_skill','weapon_slotb_skill') for c in DB.skills.get('{v:UNIT_SELECTED_SKILL}').components)) else 'SLOTC' if '{v:UNIT_SELECTED_SKILL}'=='Empty_SlotC' or (DB.skills.get('{v:UNIT_SELECTED_SKILL}') and any(c.nid in ('slotc_skill','weapon_slotc_skill') for c in DB.skills.get('{v:UNIT_SELECTED_SKILL}').components)) else 'ASSIST'
#Pull the matching learned-but-unequipped skills for that category, computed live from the unit's fields.

game_var;CATEGORY_LEARNED;','.join([s for s in (u('{unit}').get_field('LearnedSkills') or []) if s and s not in (u('{unit}').get_field('EquippedSkills') or []) and DB.skills.get(s) and any(c.nid == {'SPECIAL':'special_skill','SLOTA':'slota_skill','SLOTB':'slotb_skill','SLOTC':'slotc_skill','ASSIST':'assist_skill'}['{v:SELECTED_CATEGORY}'] for c in DB.skills.get(s).components)]) or 'Empty_Skill_List'
#If the slot is locked by a weapon skill, no operation is available. Otherwise: empty slot -> Add only; occupied -> Swap/Remove.

name: Skill_Swap_Add

name: Tutorial3
_source: speak1 = 'This is "Tale of the Golden' + " Knight's Skill System Tutorial" + '". In this game, each unit, including a character with an identity or a generic unit, can have a total of seven slots of skill to be equipped.'

$speak "" "This is the Character Skill, the kind of skill that is unique and belongs to one and only one character.|It can't be removed and can be upgraded throughout the game, as the character's story progresses." "center" 200 "hint" NumLines=3

$speak "" "This is Class Skill, the kind of skill that is unique and only belonged to one single class.|It can't be removed and only change when ever the unit has class changed through promotion." "bottom" 180 "hint" NumLines=3

$speak "" "This is Special Skill, the kind of skill that required certain condtion so it could be activated in combat.|It can be removed and replaced with other Special Skill. Special Skill is rewarded when ever a unit reaches level 5 of the current class.|Changing class and reaching another level 5 can aquire another Special Skill." "bottom" 200 "hint" NumLines=4

$speak "" "This is Passive Skill, the kind of skill that provided special effect in or out of combat.|Passive Skill can be removed and replace with another Passive Skill with same slot.|Passive Skill is rewarded when ever a unit reaches level 3 of the current class.|Changing class and reaching another level 3 can aquire another Passive Skill." "top" 160 "hint" NumLines=3

$speak "" "This is Extra Skill, the kind of skill that can only be aquired by equipping a weapon or item that is provided Extra Skill.|It would be removed automatically when the weapon or the item that provided the Extra Skill is unequipped." "center" 210 "hint" NumLines=3

$speak "" "This is Costume Item, a special item that provide some extra effect, buff or ability for the character that currently equip it.|Costume Item can not be stolen by any mean and can be removed or equipped during the battle preparation screen.|Costume Item will be dropped upon dead and will be stored in the convoy automatically." "top" 210 "hint" NumLines=3
speak2 = 'This is the end of "Tale of the Golden' + " Knight's Skill System Tutorial" + '". If you wish to watch this again, you can always review it in the "Information' + '" menu.'

name: Mission1

name: Mari_Spell_Setup
_source: #Lazy-init Mari's spell storage fields so later expressions never fail.

name: Mari_Spell_Learn
_source: #Adds the spell nid held in game var MARI_NEW_SPELL to Mari's known_spells (no duplicates). The caller must set MARI_NEW_SPELL before triggering this script.

name: Mari_Loadout_Open
_source: #Spell loadout manager. Fires when a unit talks to the LoadoutManager NPC at Naga's Fortress (level_nid/NPC nid are placeholders - rename to your real ones).
#The persist choice stays open and live-refreshes after every add/remove. The loadout is Mari's spell source on its own - no inventory sync is needed.

table;MARI_RIGHT_SPELLS;(lambda A, f=lambda n: n+'|'+next((str(r.element)+' '+str(r.rank) for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid==n), n)+(' R' if any(str(r.is_ranged).strip().lower() in ('1','true','yes','y','t') for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid==n) else '')+(' PRF' if any(str(r.is_prf).strip().lower() in ('1','true','yes','y','t') for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid==n) else ''): ([f(s) for s in A] if A else (['Empty_Spell|(loadout full)'] if len(u('Mari').get_field('spell_loadout') or []) >= 5 else ['Empty_Spell|(none learned yet)'])))([s for s in (u('Mari').get_field('known_spells') or []) if s not in (u('Mari').get_field('spell_loadout') or [])]);    Available Spells;5,1;100;top_right;menu_bg_base;type_base_item;left;expression

choice;MARI_LOADOUT_SEL;    Spells Equipped;(lambda L, f=lambda n: n+'|'+next((str(r.element)+' '+str(r.rank) for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid==n), n)+(' R' if any(str(r.is_ranged).strip().lower() in ('1','true','yes','y','t') for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid==n) else '')+(' PRF' if any(str(r.is_prf).strip().lower() in ('1','true','yes','y','t') for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid==n) else ''): [(f(L[i]) if i < len(L) else 'Empty_Spell|Empty Slot') for i in range(5)])(u('Mari').get_field('spell_loadout') or []);100;vert;top_left;;Global Mari_Loadout_Operations;type_base_item;5,1;left;persist;backable;expression

name: Mari_Loadout_Operations
_source: #Routes a selection from the persist loadout menu: an empty slot (Empty_Spell) opens the Add submenu (cursor jumps to the right list); a real spell nid opens the Swap/Remove submenu.

name: Mari_Loadout_Add
_source: #Add a learned spell into an empty slot. Max 5 is implicit - no empty slot exists when the loadout is full. Enforces at most 1 ranged spell and at most 1 S/SS spell (prf counts toward S/SS).
if;len([s for s in (u('Mari').get_field('known_spells') or []) if s not in (u('Mari').get_field('spell_loadout') or [])]) == 0
alert;Mari has no more learned spells to add.

choice;MARI_ADD_SEL;Add which spell?;(lambda L, f=lambda n: n+'|'+next((str(r.element)+' '+str(r.rank) for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid==n), n)+(' R' if any(str(r.is_ranged).strip().lower() in ('1','true','yes','y','t') for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid==n) else '')+(' PRF' if any(str(r.is_prf).strip().lower() in ('1','true','yes','y','t') for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid==n) else ''): ([f(s) for s in L] if L else ['NONE|(no spells available)']))([s for s in (u('Mari').get_field('known_spells') or []) if s not in (u('Mari').get_field('spell_loadout') or [])]);100;vert;top_right;;;type_base_item;5,1;left;scroll_bar;backable;expression
game_var;MARI_CAND_RANGED;any(str(r.is_ranged).strip().lower() in ('1','true','yes','y','t') for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid=='{v:MARI_ADD_SEL}')
game_var;MARI_CAND_SUPER;any(str(r.rank).strip().upper() in ('S','SS') for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid=='{v:MARI_ADD_SEL}')
game_var;MARI_HAS_RANGED;any(any(str(r.is_ranged).strip().lower() in ('1','true','yes','y','t') for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid==s) for s in (u('Mari').get_field('spell_loadout') or []))
game_var;MARI_HAS_SUPER;any(any(str(r.rank).strip().upper() in ('S','SS') for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid==s) for s in (u('Mari').get_field('spell_loadout') or []))
alert;Only one ranged spell can be carried at a time.
alert;Only one S or SS rank spell can be carried at a time.

name: Mari_Loadout_Slot_Ops
_source: #Submenu for a filled slot (its spell nid is in MARI_LOADOUT_SEL). Offers Swap (only when another learned spell is available) and Remove.
if;len([s for s in (u('Mari').get_field('known_spells') or []) if s not in (u('Mari').get_field('spell_loadout') or [])]) > 0
set_unit_field;Mari;spell_loadout;[s for s in (u('Mari').get_field('spell_loadout') or []) if s != '{v:MARI_LOADOUT_SEL}']

name: Mari_Loadout_Swap
_source: #Swap the spell currently in MARI_LOADOUT_SEL for another learned spell, replacing it in place (order preserved). Ranged and S/SS constraints are checked against the loadout with the outgoing spell excluded.

choice;MARI_SWAP_SEL;Swap in which spell?;(lambda L, f=lambda n: n+'|'+next((str(r.element)+' '+str(r.rank) for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid==n), n)+(' R' if any(str(r.is_ranged).strip().lower() in ('1','true','yes','y','t') for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid==n) else '')+(' PRF' if any(str(r.is_prf).strip().lower() in ('1','true','yes','y','t') for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid==n) else ''): ([f(s) for s in L] if L else ['NONE|(no spells available)']))([s for s in (u('Mari').get_field('known_spells') or []) if s not in (u('Mari').get_field('spell_loadout') or [])]);100;vert;top_right;;;type_base_item;5,1;left;scroll_bar;backable;expression
game_var;MARI_CAND_RANGED;any(str(r.is_ranged).strip().lower() in ('1','true','yes','y','t') for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid=='{v:MARI_SWAP_SEL}')
game_var;MARI_CAND_SUPER;any(str(r.rank).strip().upper() in ('S','SS') for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid=='{v:MARI_SWAP_SEL}')

game_var;MARI_HAS_RANGED;any(any(str(r.is_ranged).strip().lower() in ('1','true','yes','y','t') for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid==s) for s in (u('Mari').get_field('spell_loadout') or []) if s != '{v:MARI_LOADOUT_SEL}')

game_var;MARI_HAS_SUPER;any(any(str(r.rank).strip().upper() in ('S','SS') for r in game.get_data('MariSpell') if r.nid==s) for s in (u('Mari').get_field('spell_loadout') or []) if s != '{v:MARI_LOADOUT_SEL}')
alert;Only one ranged spell can be carried at a time.
alert;Only one S or SS rank spell can be carried at a time.
set_unit_field;Mari;spell_loadout;['{v:MARI_SWAP_SEL}' if s == '{v:MARI_LOADOUT_SEL}' else s for s in (u('Mari').get_field('spell_loadout') or [])]

name: Mari_LevelUp_Learn
condition: unit1.nid == 'Mari' and unit1.level in (5, 10, 15, 20) and source == 'exp_gain'
_source: # Mari learns a spell at level milestones 5/10/15/20. Number of offered options scales with tier (T1->2, T2->3, T3->4).

# At least one rank-up option (an upgrade_of a spell she already knows, capped at A, no S/SS) is offered when available; the rest are brand-new elements at their base spell. Dark element and all ranged spells are excluded from the level-up pool.
# Special: at level 15, T2 also offers the S staff-prf and T3 the SS staff-prf when she has not yet reached that staff rank.
return [c.strip() for c in str(s).split(',') if c.strip()]
tier = 3 if mari.klass in t3 else (2 if mari.klass in t2 else 1)
nm = it.name if it else r.nid
return r.nid + '|' + ('↑' if up else '') + str(nm) + ' HP' + str(_hp(r))
known_elems = set(str(r.element).strip() for r in catalog if r.nid in known)

rankups = [r for r in catalog if r.nid not in known and str(r.upgrade_of).strip() and str(r.upgrade_of).strip() in known and str(r.rank).strip().upper() not in ('S', 'SS') and not _truthy(r.is_ranged) and not _truthy(r.is_prf) and not _dark(r)]

newelems = [r for r in catalog if r.nid not in known and not str(r.upgrade_of).strip() and str(r.element).strip() not in known_elems and not _truthy(r.is_ranged) and not _truthy(r.is_prf) and not _dark(r)]
rankup_nids = set(r.nid for r in rankups)
if mari.level == 15 and tier == 2 and staff_rank not in ('S', 'SS'):
elif mari.level == 15 and tier == 3 and staff_rank != 'SS':
options = [_label(r, r.nid in rankup_nids) for r in chosen]
if prf_nid and prf_nid not in known:
pnm = pit.name if pit else prf_nid
$choice "MARI_LU_PICK" "Mari may learn a new spell" opts_str 150 "vert" "center" "menu_bg_base" '' "type_base_item"

name: Mari_StaffRank_Prf
condition: unit.nid == 'Mari' and str(weapon_type) == 'Staff' and str(rank).strip().upper() in ('S', 'SS')
_source: # When Mari's Staff rank reaches S she learns the S staff-prf spell; when it reaches SS she learns the SS staff-prf and the now-obsolete S-prf is removed from both her known list and her loadout.
new_known = [s for s in (mari.get_field('known_spells') or []) if s != 'Mari_S_Prf']
new_loadout = [s for s in (mari.get_field('spell_loadout') or []) if s != 'Mari_S_Prf']

name: Mari_Book_Learn
_source: # Triggered by the 'learn_spell_from_book' item component when Mari studies a spell book.
# 'mari_new_spell' is the list of spell item nids this book can teach (the component's spell list).
# Offers exactly those spells, filtered to ones Mari can learn now: not already known and not above her current Staff rank.
return r.nid + '|' + str(r.element) + ' ' + str(r.rank) + '  HP' + str(_hp(r))
$alert "Mari cannot learn anything new from this book right now."

name: Mari_Athos_Talk
_source: # When Mari talks to Athos, Athos reviews Mari's support bonds. For each partner who has reached the
# required support rank -- 'A' for a male partner (tag 'male'), 'A+' for a female partner (tag 'female') --
# he checks whether that partner has mastered a magic weapon type (S or SS in Light / Anima / Dark).
# For every mastered type, Mari may learn the secret arts (both the S and SS spell) of a matching element.
# The five Anima elements (Fire / Water / Thunder / Wind / Earth) all map to the Anima weapon type;
# Light and Dark map to themselves. If several elements qualify, Mari chooses one; she then learns both
# its S and SS spell, each routed through Mari_Spell_Acquire (auto-equip or full-loadout choice).
# This is parameterized: if no qualifying partner has a gender tag / A or A+ rank, the event is a no-op.
mari = unit if unit.nid == 'Mari' else unit2
return 'Anima' if elem in ANIMA_ELEMENTS else elem
partner_nid = pair.unit2 if pair.unit1 == 'Mari' else pair.unit1
sp = next((r for r in catalog if str(r.element).strip() == elem and str(r.rank).strip().upper() == rk and not _is_prf(r)), None)
if sp and sp.nid not in known:
elems_avail = sorted(set(str(r.element).strip() for r in catalog if _type_of(str(r.element).strip()) in mastered and not _is_prf(r)))
pending = [e for e in elems_avail if _elem_targets(e)]
opts_str = ','.join(e + '|' + e + ' (S & SS)' for e in pending)
$choice "MARI_ATHOS_ELEM" "Athos can teach the secret arts of which element?" opts_str 150 "vert" "center" "menu_bg_base"

name: Mari_Spell_Acquire
_source: # Acquires the spell whose nid is stored in game var MARI_NEW_SPELL.
# 2) Auto-equips into spell_loadout if there is a free slot (<5) and it does not break the
#    'at most 1 ranged / at most 1 S or SS' rule.
# 3) Otherwise opens a panel of the candidate spells (current loadout + the new spell) and lets the
#    player pick exactly one to leave in storage; the remaining (up to 5) stay equipped. Picks that
#    would still break the ranged / S-SS rule are rejected and the panel reopens.
# The loadout is the sole source of Mari's usable spells in combat - no inventory sync is needed.
by_nid = {r.nid: r for r in catalog}
return r is not None and str(r.is_ranged).strip().lower() in ('1', 'true', 'yes', 'y', 't')
return r is not None and str(r.rank).strip().upper() in ('S', 'SS')
return r is not None and str(r.is_prf).strip().lower() in ('1', 'true', 'yes', 'y', 't')
txt = nid + '|' + (str(r.element) + ' ' + str(r.rank) if r else nid)
if len([s for s in loadout if _is_ranged(s)]) > 1:
if len([s for s in loadout if _is_super(s)]) > 1:
nm = it.name if it else nid
return (nm + ' ' + str(r.rank).strip()) if r else nm
$choice "MARI_ACQ_DROP" "Spell loadout full -- store which spell?" opts 180 "vert" "center" "menu_bg_base" "" "type_base_item"
if pick and pick in candidates:
new_loadout = [n for n in candidates if n != pick]
store_msg = '<blue>Mari</> learned <green>' + _spell_info(new_spell) + '</> {icon:' + new_spell + '}, kept in storage.'
$alert "That would keep two ranged or two S/SS spells. Choose another to store."
